name: Dataseat
description: Privacy-first mobile DSP enabling custom bidding, SKAdNetwork and AdAttributionKit support for app user acquisition.

seo.title: Dataseat — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Dataseat: Privacy-first mobile DSP enabling custom bidding, SKAdNetwork and AdAttributionKit support for app user acquisition.

when_to_use: Privacy-first mobile UA with custom bidding logic on owned DSP
SKAdNetwork 4.0 and AdAttributionKit compliant iOS user acquisition
Programmatic app installs without third-party data dependency
Transparent DSP for app advertisers wanting auction-level data control

pros: Privacy-first bidder with SKAN/AAK built in
Custom bidding logic you can actually control
cons: Self-serve requires technical ad ops knowledge
review.verdict: Privacy-era DSP for teams that want control and logs, not a magic black-box result.
review.best_for: Sophisticated mobile marketers building custom bidding models post-ATT.
review.not_for: Teams wanting fully managed, hands-off programmatic UA with turnkey creatives.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone, no explicit peak-lock evidence
